fields.title: Duration
fields.description: Amount of time in seconds the trap exists. After this amount of time is elapsed, the trap is removed from the world if it hasn't been activated

fields.title: Within Radius
fields.description: Distance in blocks that the player has to be within to trigger the horse trap

fields.title: Priority
fields.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

description: Allows Equine mobs to be Horse Traps and be triggered like them, spawning a lightning bolt and a bunch of horses when a player is nearby. Can only be used by Horses, Mules, Donkeys and Skeleton Horses.
title: Skeleton Horse Trap Behavior
